name: TAPLA Dark Premium
description: Тёмный премиум — флагманы, luxury, игровые устройства.

design_spec.background: Dark charcoal to black gradient #1A1A1A to #0D0D0D, subtle radial highlight behind product.
design_spec.lighting: Dramatic single key light top-left 45° beauty dish, subtle rim light back cool white #E8E8E8 15%. Deep shadows, high contrast.
design_spec.color_palette: Product natural colors. TAPLA gold #C9A96E accents. Text #FFFFFF. Gold accent lines.
design_spec.composition: Product center 55% of frame. Text top 12%, bottom 12%, never overlap product. 20% breathing room.
mandatory_elements: TAPLA logo bottom-right, small, gold, 20% opacity

text_rules.language: AZERBAIJANI LATIN ONLY. Never English. Never Russian.
